aiOutputDisclaimer: This content was generated by AI and may be incomplete or outdated. It is for informational purposes only and is not legal advice.
aiCitationNotice: AI outputs may cite public legal sources; verify citations before relying on them.
standardDisclaimer: Umbrella provides legal information, document explanations, issue identification, and risk analysis. It is not a law firm and does not replace a licensed attorney. For legal advice specific to your situation, consult a qualified lawyer in your jurisdiction.
attorneyDisclaimer: This platform connects you with licensed attorneys but does not provide legal advice. Communications may not be privileged until an attorney-client relationship is established.
privacyDescription: How Umbrella collects, uses, and protects your information.
privacyCollectBody: We collect account details (email, name, country), case and matter content you submit, documents you upload, billing information, and technical logs (IP, device, session) for security and audit.
privacyUseBody: We use your data to provide legal guidance tools, lawyer OS features, payments, support, and compliance auditing. We do not use your content to train AI models unless you explicitly opt in under our data consent policy.
privacySharingBody: Consumer cases are not shared with law firms until you request lawyer review or convert a lead. Firm data is isolated per tenant. We share data with subprocessors (hosting, payments, AI providers) under contractual safeguards.
privacyRetentionBody: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Retention follows your firm governance settings or consumer account deletion requests, subject to legal hold requirements.
privacyRightsBody: Depending on your jurisdiction you may request access, correction, export, or deletion of personal data. Contact support@odaflow.com to exercise these rights.
privacyTransfersBody: We may process data in regions required by country compliance policies. See admin-configured data residency settings for enterprise tenants.
termsDescription: Rules for using Umbrella consumer and lawyer platforms.
termsAgreementBody: By accessing Umbrella, you agree to these Terms. If you use the platform on behalf of a law firm, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.
termsNotLawFirmBody: Umbrella provides legal information, document assistance, issue spotting, and risk analysis. We are not a law firm and do not provide legal representation unless you engage a verified lawyer through our marketplace.
termsAcceptableUseBody: You may not use the service to impersonate a lawyer, guarantee legal outcomes, or submit unlawful content. AI outputs must be reviewed before external filings or client advice.
termsBillingBody: Paid plans, per-report purchases, and lawyer review fees are billed according to the pricing shown at checkout for your country. Trials convert to paid plans unless cancelled before the trial ends.
termsDataBody: Our collection and use of personal data is described in the Privacy Policy. Training and analytics uses require explicit opt-in as described in the Data & AI Consent Policy.
termsLiabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Umbrella is not liable for decisions you make based on AI outputs. You are responsible for consulting qualified counsel in your jurisdiction.
dataConsentDescription: How we handle AI training, evaluation, and anonymized analytics.
dataConsentDefaultHeading: Default: no training on your data
dataConsentDefaultBody: Umbrella does not use your documents, case facts, or matter content to train AI models unless you explicitly opt in. Firm training consent defaults to off for all tenants.
dataConsentOptInIntro: If you opt in, you may separately enable:
dataConsentOptInEval: Model evaluation (quality testing on redacted samples)
dataConsentOptInAnonymize: All opt-in data requires anonymization before any training pipeline.
dataConsentCountryBody: Some jurisdictions require explicit consent before any training use. Country compliance policies enforce disclaimer and consent rules per region.
dataConsentWithdrawBody: You may withdraw consent at any time. Withdrawal stops future use; previously anonymized datasets may be retained per audit policy until revoked by platform administrators.
disclaimerPageDescription: Important notices about AI-generated legal information.
disclaimerNotProvideSubstitute: Substitute for a licensed lawyer in your jurisdiction
disclaimerLawyerReviewBody: Lawyer-reviewed reports and strategy memos require human attorney approval before they may be relied upon as formal legal advice.
disclaimerConsumerVsLawyerBody: Consumer tools provide plain-language guidance and risk analysis. Lawyer OS tools assist licensed professionals who remain responsible for all client advice and filings.
